nodes.label: OE Icon 192x192
nodes.summary: 192x192 PNG app icon for Open Energy Platform. Shows two interlocking circular arcs forming an abstract logo — one in medium blue and one in dark navy — with a small teal/green eye-like dot accent at their intersection. Light grey background. No visible text.

nodes.label: Open Energy Platform
nodes.summary: South African energy exchange platform (power trading, carbon, IPP lifecycle, settlement, regulatory compliance).

nodes.label: Brand Color: Medium Blue
nodes.summary: Medium/steel blue (#3A7BC8 approx) used for the larger outer arc in the OE icon.

nodes.label: Brand Color: Dark Navy
nodes.summary: Dark navy blue (#1B2E4B approx) used for the inner/secondary arc in the OE icon.

nodes.label: Brand Color: Teal/Green Accent
nodes.summary: Small teal/green dot (#2ABFA3 approx) accent visible at the intersection of the two arcs, suggesting an 'eye' or focal point motif.

nodes.label: PWA Manifest Icon (192px)
nodes.summary: 192px is a standard PWA manifest icon size used for home-screen and splash-screen display on mobile devices.
